    E

    email - Variable in class Controllers.InformationController
     
    email - Variable in class Controllers.RegisterationController
    Text fields for user input during registration: - userID: the ID of the user - name: full name - phone: phone number - email: email address - userName: username for login - membershipCode: optional membership code (for subscribers)
    email - Variable in class Entities.User
     
    email - Variable in class messages.AddToWaitingListRequest
    The user's email address.
    email - Variable in class messages.RegisterRequest
    The email address of the user.
    Email - Variable in class Entities.WaitingListEntry
    Email of the user or phone as a fallback.

    emailOrPhone - Variable in class Controllers.GuestMakeReservationController

    endDate - Variable in class Entities.Report
    End date of the reporting period.
    endDate - Variable in class messages.GetWaitingListBetweenDatesRequest
    The end date of the range for the waiting list retrieval.

    enums - package enums

    Executes the logic to find nearest available times.

    Executes the report generation logic.

    Executes the retrieval logic for restaurant settings.

    Executes the user information retrieval logic.

    Executes the retrieval logic for a customer's reservations.

    Executes the update user operation.
    execute(Object, ConnectionToClient) - Method in interface server.Command
    Executes the specific logic associated with a client request. * @param data The data payload sent by the client, which may be cast to specific message or entity types depending on the implementation.
    existsDay(Day) - Method in class DAO.RestaurantSettingsDAO
    Checks if a configuration for a specific day already exists in the database. * @param day the Day to check.

    Marks the entry as exited for the given reason.
    exitReason - Variable in class Entities.WaitingListEntry
    Reason why the customer left the waiting list.
